base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sasquatch — a character from 1994 darkstalkers. Sasquatch — bigfoot fighter. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sasquatch — bigfoot fighter; Big Snow Shove + Big Typhoon
